name: Hill's Science Diet Adult Small Bites Lamb Meal & Brown Rice Recipe Dry Dog Food
description: Hill's Science Diet Adult Advanced Fitness Small Bites Lamb Meal & Rice Dry Dog Food provides your pup with precise nutrition for a healthy lifestyle. Made with wholesome ingredients such as lamb meal and rice, this nourishing recipe is balanced to meet your pet’s needs, encourage strong, learn muscles, and promote a healthy skin and coat. Manufactured in the United States, every ingredient meets strict requirements for purity and nutrient content which exceed industry standards. Formulated for adult dogs 1 to 6 years of age, this Hill’s Science Diet provides your pooch with the nutrition he needs for a lifetime of health and happiness.
